# Liégeois Designs

> Boutique visual storytelling studio specializing in presentation design, pitch decks, and brand identity. Founded and led by Arthur Liégeois, creative director with 10+ years designing high-stakes presentations for global brands and funded startups.

Liégeois Designs is a solo creative studio run by Arthur Liégeois. The studio designs investor pitch decks, executive presentations, sales decks, training presentations, and brand identities for companies across healthcare, technology, finance, hospitality, and consumer goods. Arthur works directly with clients — no account managers, no junior designers. He functions as both strategist and designer, embedding into client teams to translate complex narratives into visuals that move rooms and close deals.

## Core Services

- Pitch & Investor Deck Design: High-stakes fundraising presentations for startups and growth-stage companies. Combines narrative strategy with editorial visual design to help founders and executives secure investment.
- Executive Presentation Design: C-suite and board-level presentations for Fortune 500 companies and global brands. Designed to command authority and drive decisions.
- Sales & Agency Deck Design: New business pitches and agency credentials decks. Built to win competitive pitches and earn client trust.
- Training Presentation Design: POA field training decks and internal education materials for pharmaceutical and enterprise clients.
- Strategic Narrative: Narrative architecture for companies repositioning, launching, or communicating complex transformations.
- Brand Identity: Full visual brand systems for startups and growth companies — logo, color, typography, and application.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/): Overview of the studio, featured work, services, and client testimonials.
- [Work / Portfolio](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work): Full portfolio of 36 case studies across presentation design, pitch decks, brand identity, and creative direction.
- [Services](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/services): Detailed breakdown of service offerings including pitch decks, executive presentations, sales decks, and brand identity.
- [About](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/about): Background on Arthur Liégeois — creative director, visual storyteller, and studio founder.
- [Blog](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/blog): 20+ articles on presentation design, visual storytelling, pitch strategy, brand identity, and creative direction.
- [Contact](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/contact): Start a project with Liégeois Designs.

## Selected Case Studies

- [Chevron New Energies](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/chevron-new-energies): Strategic narrative and pitch deck design for a Fortune 500 energy company's clean energy transition story.
- [Philips Healthcare](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/philips-healthcare): Healthcare technology presentation design making complex medical innovation accessible to executive and investor audiences.
- [The Spaceship](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/the-spaceship): ESG startup investor pitch deck designed to secure funding for a purpose-driven sustainable business.
- [MCS Healthcare × J&J](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/mcs-healthcare-jandj): Executive pitch deck for a pharmaceutical presentation requiring boardroom authority.
- [Intercept Pharmaceuticals](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/intercept-pharma): Pharmaceutical sales training deck turning dense medical content into engaging field-ready material.
- [IBM Quantum Summit 2022](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/ibm-quantum-summit-2022-cn3q3): Keynote presentation design for IBM's flagship quantum computing conference.
- [Bloomberg Media Group](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/bloomberg-media-internal-dei-strategy): Internal DEI strategy presentation for the C-suite of a global media company.
- [Norigami Brand Identity](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/norigami-brand): Full brand identity system for a food startup — logo, visual language, and packaging.
- [Norigami Investor Deck](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/norigami-slide-1-7cc23): Seed funding pitch deck for an allergen-free food startup that closed the round.
- [Echo Society](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/echo-society): Brand and culture storytelling pitch deck for a creative community platform.
- [Marriott Luxury Group](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/marriott-luxury-group): YouTube content strategy executive presentation for a global luxury hospitality brand.
- [OPMG × RAPP](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/rapp-opmg): Connected data strategy deck translating complex marketing insights into compelling visual narrative.
- [Underpin](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/underpin): Startup investor pitch deck for a geo-centric travel app seeking seed funding.
- [University Startups](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/university-startups): Social entrepreneurship pitch deck designed to secure funding for student-led ventures.
- [Post Consumer Brands](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/grey-slide-sample-1-8439d): New business pitch deck for a major FMCG brand.
- [CDW × Ogilvy](https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com/work/ogilvy-for-cdw-1-98a9e): Agency new business pitch positioning Ogilvy as CDW's ideal creative partner.

## Blog Topics

The blog covers presentation design strategy, pitch deck structure, visual storytelling, brand identity, creative direction, neurodivergent design thinking, and entrepreneurship. Topics include how AI is changing creative direction, how to structure a pitch deck that closes, the discipline of visual restraint, and the role of narrative in high-stakes business communication.

## Contact & Credentials

- Website: https://www.liegeoisdesigns.com
- Email: arthur@liegeoisdesigns.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aliegeois/
- Location: New Jersey, USA (works with clients worldwide)
- Studio type: Solo boutique — Arthur Liégeois is the only designer
- Clients include: Chevron, Philips, IBM, Bloomberg Media, Marriott, Johnson & Johnson, Ogilvy, RAPP, Starz, Post Consumer Brands
- Industries served: Healthcare, Pharma, Energy, Technology, Hospitality, Finance, Consumer Goods, Startups
